## Cases mentioned in passing

### Forging press casting repair
- **canonical_cluster_id:** "Forging press casting repair"
- **Anchor:** `§4.p7`
- **Quote (layer 3):** "So what can you say when you don't know anything about it? You can go back to the fundamentals. I couldn't change material, they already had a very good low-hydrogen environment, the only thing I could do was relieve the stress. And I thought of a way to relieve the stress, and I walked out of there a hero. I should look up what I charged — I have records, I think I probably charged 180 bucks for that, and I'd been there a couple of hours. I walked out the hero and thought, I'll get some more work from these people. Then they closed down the shipyard. But they did get the ship out. So that's..."
